name: CFS Ready to Process
description: Standard image deployment service. The device is loaded with a pre-validated customer image using Lenovo's RTP process. Suitable for high-volume, repeatable deployments where the image is already certified.

name: CFS Advanced Image ETO
description: Engineered-to-order imaging service for complex or non-standard customer image requirements. Includes image validation, customisation, and certification. Requires a signed SOW before work begins.

name: CFS Image Management 1 Year
description: Managed image hosting and maintenance service for a 12-month period. CFS stores, updates, and validates the customer image. Ensures the image remains current with driver and security patches.

name: CFS Image Recovery
description: Recovery imaging service applied to returned or refurbished devices. Restores device to a known-good image state prior to redeployment or disposal. Available for ThinkPad and ThinkCentre product lines.

name: CFS Single Client Touch Enrollment
description: Zero-touch provisioning service using Microsoft Autopilot or similar MDM platform. Device is enrolled into the customer's tenant and provisioned with policies and apps during a single-touch CFS process.

name: CFS Ready to Work Black
description: Full device configuration service including BIOS configuration, OS provisioning, application installation, and asset tagging. Device is fully end-user ready on arrival. Black box delivery format.

name: CFS Autopilot Pre-Provisioning
description: White-glove Autopilot pre-provisioning service. CFS completes the hardware provisioning phase on behalf of the customer, ensuring devices arrive fully configured and ready for user assignment. Requires SOW and tenant access.

name: CFS Asset Tag Report
description: Generates a detailed asset report including serial numbers, model numbers, and applied asset tag values. Delivered as a structured CSV or Excel file for import into customer CMDB or asset management systems.

name: CFS Asset Tag Custom Label
description: Application of customer-provided or CFS-generated custom asset labels to devices. Supports barcode, QR code, and plain-text formats. Label artwork must be submitted and approved before production.

name: CFS Mobile Application Loading
description: Pre-loading of enterprise mobile applications onto Android or iOS devices prior to shipment. Applications are sourced from the customer's MDM repository. Requires SOW specifying app list and MDM credentials.

name: CFS MDM Pre-Enrollment
description: Pre-enrollment of mobile devices into the customer's MDM platform (Intune, Jamf, MobileIron, etc.) before shipment. Device arrives in a supervised and managed state. Requires SOW and MDM access.

name: CFS Drive Encryption
description: Standard drive encryption service using BitLocker or equivalent. Encryption keys are escrowed to the customer's key management system or Azure AD. Encryption applied before device leaves CFS facility.

name: CFS Full Drive Encryption ETO
description: Engineered-to-order full drive encryption service supporting non-standard encryption platforms and custom key management integrations. Requires SOW and technical discovery session with the customer security team.

name: CFS Custom BIOS Settings
description: Application of customer-specific BIOS configuration profiles to devices at the CFS facility. Covers boot order, security settings, TPM configuration, and port enablement. Profile must be validated by Lenovo engineering before deployment.

name: CFS Intel vPro Provisioning
description: Intel vPro / AMT provisioning service. Configures out-of-band management capabilities on vPro-enabled devices. Requires customer MEBx credentials and network configuration details. Signed SOW required.

name: CFS Laser Etching
description: Permanent laser engraving of customer-specified text, logos, or asset identifiers onto device surfaces. Supports ThinkPad lids and ThinkCentre chassis. Artwork must be submitted in approved vector format.

name: CFS UV Printing
description: UV printing service for high-resolution colour branding and custom graphics on device surfaces. Suitable for corporate branding, event devices, and premium fleet personalisation. EMEA only.

name: CFS Warehousing
description: Managed warehousing and inventory holding service at a CFS facility. Customer stock is received, inspected, stored, and despatched on demand. Requires SOW defining volume, SLA, and handling requirements.

name: CFS Project Management
description: Dedicated CFS project manager assigned to oversee complex or large-scale deployment programmes. Provides planning, coordination, status reporting, and escalation management. Billed per engagement.

name: CFS Staffing
description: On-site or near-site CFS-trained technician staffing for customer deployment events, IT refreshes, or sustained configuration programmes. Technicians are Lenovo-certified. EMEA only. SOW required.
